name: Express Credit Auto
description_short: Oklahoma buy here pay here dealership offering in-house auto financing for bad or no credit buyers at 5 locations since 1996, with credit bureau reporting.
description_long:
Express Credit Auto is an Oklahoma-based used car dealership that has operated buy here pay here (BHPH) financing since 1996. The company runs five locations across the state — North OKC, South OKC, Midwest City, Norman, and Tulsa — serving customers who have been turned down by traditional lenders. Nearly three decades in business has made it one of the more established BHPH operators in the Oklahoma City metro area.

The company's core product is in-house auto financing on used cars, trucks, and SUVs. Unlike conventional dealerships that route buyers through banks or credit unions, Express Credit Auto acts as its own lender. Customers apply online or in-store, receive a decision quickly, and drive off the lot — sometimes within 24 hours. The inventory spans a range of pre-owned vehicles across price points, with down payments structured to fit varying credit situations.

What sets Express Credit Auto apart from many BHPH operators is its credit bureau reporting policy. Payments are reported to the credit bureaus, meaning on-time payments can actively rebuild a damaged credit profile. The company also includes a 3-year/36,000-mile limited warranty on every vehicle at no extra cost, charges no processing fees, and offers a trade-up program that allows customers to upgrade to a newer vehicle after a track record of on-time payments. A refer-a-friend program and a dedicated online payment portal round out the customer experience.

Honestly, BHPH financing is a last-resort product category. Interest rates are typically significantly higher than what a bank or credit union would offer a buyer with good credit, and loan approval is tied exclusively to vehicles on the lot — there is no cash disbursement. Customers outside Oklahoma have no access to this lender. That said, for the specific audience Express Credit Auto targets — people who need transportation now and have limited financing options — the credit-building mechanism and included warranty provide genuine value that cheaper alternatives often don't.
address: 1 W I-240 Service Road, Oklahoma City, OK 73139

company_info.headquarters: 1 W I-240 Service Road, Oklahoma City, OK 73139

pros: Reports all payments to credit bureaus — actively helps rebuild credit history
3-year/36,000-mile limited warranty included on every vehicle at no extra cost
No processing fees — total cost transparency with no hidden charges
Approval process can be completed in as little as 24 hours
Five Oklahoma locations (North OKC, South OKC, Midwest City, Norman, Tulsa)
Trade-up program available after a qualifying number of on-time payments
Operating since 1996 — nearly 30 years of local BHPH experience
cons: Oklahoma-only — no service available to customers outside the state
BHPH loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional bank or credit union auto financing
Financing is tied to purchasing a vehicle from their lot — no standalone loan product
Inventory is limited to used vehicles; no new cars available
Down payment is required; amount varies and is determined by individual credit situation
best_for: Oklahoma residents with bad credit who need reliable transportation now
People with no credit history who have been rejected by conventional lenders
Buyers actively trying to rebuild their credit through consistent on-time payments
Subprime borrowers who want warranty protection on a used vehicle purchase
diagnosis: Express Credit Auto is best suited for Oklahoma residents with bad or no credit who need a vehicle and want to rebuild their credit score through auto loan payments. The main caveat is that buy here pay here financing carries materially higher interest rates than conventional auto loans — buyers who can qualify elsewhere should do so first.
services: In-house buy here pay here (BHPH) auto financing
Used car, truck, and SUV sales
Trade-up program after on-time payment history
Credit bureau reporting on all loan payments
Bad credit and no credit financing
